groups.name: recommend.regular
groups.description: 常规 CF 推荐主链路配置

groups.name: recommend.cache
groups.description: 推荐缓存与防击穿配置

groups.name: recommend.score-snapshot
groups.description: 推荐评分快照表刷新配置

groups.name: recommend.async
groups.description: 推荐主链路异步执行配置

groups.name: recommend.hot-sync
groups.description: Redis 热榜同步到数据库快照配置

properties.name: app.name
properties.description: 应用名称

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origin-patterns
properties.description: 允许跨域访问的来源模式，多个值用逗号分隔

properties.name: app.upload.video-dir
properties.description: 视频文件本地存储目录

properties.name: app.video.base-url
properties.description: 视频文件对外访问基础地址

properties.name: app.video.ffprobe-path
properties.description: ffprobe 可执行文件路径

properties.name: mybatis-plus.mapper-locations
properties.description: MyBatis-Plus Mapper XML 位置

properties.name: mybatis-plus.type-aliases-package
properties.description: MyBatis-Plus 类型别名扫描包

properties.name: mybatis-plus.configuration.log-impl
properties.description: MyBatis 日志实现类，默认不启用；dev profile 使用 StdOutImpl 打印 SQL

properties.name: mybatis-plus.configuration.map-underscore-to-camel-case
properties.description: 是否启用下划线到驼峰字段映射

properties.name: recommend.regular.service-url
properties.description: 外部协同过滤推荐服务地址

properties.name: recommend.regular.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: CF 服务连接超时（毫秒）

properties.name: recommend.regular.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: CF 服务读取超时（毫秒）

properties.name: recommend.regular.request-top-n
properties.description: 请求外部 CF 服务时的候选数量

properties.name: recommend.regular.cold-start-limit
properties.description: 用户冷启动推荐返回上限

properties.name: recommend.regular.candidate-pool-size
properties.description: 常规 CF 过滤后参与图谱打分的候选池大小

properties.name: recommend.regular.cf-weight
properties.description: 常规 CF 分数在融合排序中的权重

properties.name: recommend.cache.cold-start-ttl-minutes
properties.description: 冷启动推荐结果缓存时间（分钟）

properties.name: recommend.cache.regular-ttl-minutes
properties.description: 常规推荐结果缓存时间（分钟）

properties.name: recommend.cache.build-lock-ttl-seconds
properties.description: 推荐结果回源构建锁过期时间（秒）

properties.name: recommend.cache.wait-retry-times
properties.description: 推荐缓存构建锁等待重试次数

properties.name: recommend.cache.wait-millis
properties.description: 推荐缓存构建锁每次等待时间（毫秒）

properties.name: recommend.cache.study-invalidate-throttle-seconds
properties.description: 普通 STUDY 行为触发用户推荐缓存失效的节流时间（秒）

properties.name: recommend.score-snapshot.rebuild-on-startup
properties.description: 后端启动时是否全量重建推荐评分快照表

properties.name: recommend.score-snapshot.batch-size
properties.description: 全量重建评分快照时的批量写入大小

properties.name: recommend.score-snapshot.raw-score-scale
properties.description: 隐式评分归一化到 0-10 区间时使用的缩放系数

properties.name: recommend.score-snapshot.min-score
properties.description: 评分快照保留的最低归一化分，低于该值会删除或跳过

properties.name: recommend.score.base
properties.description: 前端展示分基础值

properties.name: recommend.score.span
properties.description: 前端展示分映射跨度

properties.name: recommend.score.cold-start-user-scale
properties.description: 用户冷启动原始分到归一化分的缩放系数

properties.name: recommend.score.hot-fallback-base
properties.description: 热门兜底推荐的起始归一化分

properties.name: recommend.score.hot-fallback-step
properties.description: 热门兜底推荐按排序递减的分值步长

properties.name: recommend.score.hot-fallback-min
properties.description: 热门兜底推荐最低归一化分

properties.name: recommend.hot-fallback.limit
properties.description: 热门兜底推荐返回上限

properties.name: recommend.hot-fallback.max-scan-count
properties.description: 热门兜底最多扫描热榜数量

properties.name: recommend.graph.prerequisite-threshold
properties.description: 图谱先修掌握阈值

properties.name: recommend.graph.learning-path-limit-per-course
properties.description: 每门推荐课程返回的补齐路径上限

properties.name: recommend.async.enabled
properties.description: 推荐主链路异步执行总开关，关闭后回退到串行执行

properties.name: recommend.async.core-size
properties.description: 推荐异步线程池核心线程数

properties.name: recommend.async.max-size
properties.description: 推荐异步线程池最大线程数

properties.name: recommend.async.queue-capacity
properties.description: 推荐异步线程池队列容量

properties.name: recommend.hot-sync.enabled
properties.description: 是否定时同步 Redis 课程热度到数据库快照

properties.name: recommend.hot-sync.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: 课程热度同步间隔（毫秒）

properties.name: recommend.hot-sync.batch-size
properties.description: 课程热度同步批次大小

properties.name: recommend.new-course.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用常规推荐中的新课候选补充

properties.name: recommend.new-course.window-days
properties.description: 新课发布时间窗口（天）

properties.name: recommend.new-course.candidate-limit
properties.description: 新课预召回候选池大小

properties.name: recommend.new-course.regular-candidate-limit
properties.description: 常规 CF 链路准备的新课候选数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.fallback-limit
properties.description: CF 为空时的新课兜底上限

properties.name: recommend.new-course.max-learners
properties.description: 新课人数上限，超过该值通常视为已进入常规课程阶段

properties.name: recommend.new-course.inject-limit
properties.description: 单次最多注入的新课数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.max-exposure-ratio
properties.description: 新课在常规推荐结果中的最大曝光占比

properties.name: recommend.new-course.inject-slots
properties.description: 新课固定注入槽位，0 表示列表开头

properties.name: recommend.new-course.min-tag-count
properties.description: 新课质量门槛：最低标签数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.min-kp-count
properties.description: 新课质量门槛：最低知识点数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.min-duration-seconds
properties.description: 新课质量门槛：最低视频时长（秒）

properties.name: recommend.new-course.min-limit
properties.description: 新课推荐接口允许的最小返回数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.max-limit
properties.description: 新课推荐接口允许的最大返回数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.default-limit
properties.description: 新课推荐接口默认返回数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.tag-weight
properties.description: 新课评分中标签匹配分的权重

properties.name: recommend.new-course.freshness-weight
properties.description: 新课评分中新鲜度分的权重

properties.name: recommend.new-course.quality-weight
properties.description: 新课评分中质量分的权重

properties.name: recommend.new-course.readiness-weight
properties.description: 新课评分中可学习性分的权重

properties.name: recommend.new-course.readiness-threshold
properties.description: 新课 readiness 批量计算使用的先修掌握阈值

properties.name: recommend.new-course.learning-goal-bonus
properties.description: 新课与用户学习目标匹配时的额外加分

properties.name: recommend.new-course.quality-kp-full-score-count
properties.description: 新课质量分中知识点数量拿满分所需数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.quality-duration-full-score-seconds
properties.description: 新课质量分中课程时长拿满分所需秒数

properties.name: recommend.new-course.quality-kp-weight
properties.description: 新课质量分中知识点数量子项权重
